case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ADONIRAM GIRAO DE MENEZES FILHO

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-07-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ADONIRAM GIRO DE MENZES FILHO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,719.63 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE MENEZES FILHO, ADONIRAM GIRAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC REPRESETNED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VANESA MEZA ORTIZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
